# Sprint: Add carto stats command

> Sprint ID: CART-S02
> Status: 📝 planning
> Execution Mode: sequential

## Goal

carto exposes a stats command that prints the node and edge counts of the stored graph.

## Description

Add a read-only `carto stats` command that prints node and edge counts of the stored graph, backed by a new pure graphStats(graph) helper in src/store/graph.ts. Throwaway sprint exercising the plan -> implement -> review -> commit pipeline end-to-end.
